sha256:eb15101c1fc45e4d3bc46bceb18b929e8: query HomepageTicker($exclude: [SourceType!]!, $limit: Int!) { latestReleases(limit: $limit, excludeSourceTypes: $exclude) { items { id publishedAt source { appStore { iconUrl platform } org { avatarUrl name slug } product { name slug } video { provider } } title titleGenerated titleShort version } } }
sha256:6791f51cdafe4def724d68b5a61f88162: query ProductDetail($id: String!) { product(id: $id) { category description id name notice { coordinate href linkText message } slug sources { id isHidden metadata name slug type url } tags url } }
sha256:a9b727e50ab142ce7aa42763f0faa91f1: query SourceDetail($id: String!, $releaseLimit: Int!) { source(id: $id) { changelogUrl discovery hasChangelogFile id isHidden lastFetchedAt lastPolledAt latestDate latestVersion metadata name notice { coordinate href linkText message } org { id name slug } productId releases(limit: $releaseLimit) { content fetchedAt id media { alt r2Url type url } publishedAt summary title titleGenerated titleShort type url version } slug summaries { monthly { generatedAt month releaseCount summary windowDays year } rolling { generatedAt month releaseCount summary windowDays year } } trackingSince type url } }
